mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show zero correlation with FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, causing investors to sell equities and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 65% of instances where UNRATE crosses the threshold, or the signal loses predictive power during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate earnings growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when RSAFS and HOUST diverge, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio for the interaction term is negative over 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects immediate supply-side capacity utilization and manufacturing momentum, triggering short-term algorithmic buying and positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO momentum shows zero predictive accuracy for 5-day returns during tightening periods, or the signal reverses direction when inflation exceeds 5%.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated consumer price inflation combined with restrictive federal funds rates compresses real yields and corporate margins, forcing equity deleveraging and negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term yields positive returns when both series are high, or the model fails to reject the null hypothesis of zero alpha over a 4-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth directly maps to aggregate corporate revenue expansion, providing a fundamental floor for equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show negative correlation with 60-day equity returns, or the signal information coefficient drops below -0.01 across multiple business cycles.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly decline in total nonfarm payrolls indicates immediate labor market contraction and reduced consumer spending capacity, triggering risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS declines > 50k in a single month
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in 70% of cases following a payroll decline exceeding the threshold, or the signal exhibits no statistical edge over a buy-and-hold benchmark.

mechanism_narrative: Convergence of rising industrial production and expanding retail sales confirms synchronized supply-demand balance, reducing inventory risk and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The synchronized signal produces negative returns when macro data revisions occur, or the 5-day forward return distribution shows no significant deviation from zero during alignment periods.
